title: Create Amplified (Fabric)
description:
A mod pack that amplifies Create adding addons and mods that add backpacks, new equipment, and performance.

WARNING: This version will not be updated any futher.
body: This mod pack is based on the Create mod and includes performance mods. The mod pack also includes backpacks, new structures, and even Enderite! This mod pack has Create Addons that add certain things to the Create mod like jetpacks and new copycat blocks.
